description: Create a GitHub Actions C/C++ CI workflow for macOS that triggers on push events. Use a matrix strategy to build in both Debug and Release modes on the latest macOS environment. Check out the repository, install required packages with Homebrew, set up depot tools, fetch the WebRTC repository, build with CMake and make, create a package with CPack, and upload the resulting artifact. If the workflow is triggered by a tag, create a GitHub release with the artifact.
